title.en: A Systematic Comparative Study of MySQL and PostgreSQL
title.zh: MySQL 与 PostgreSQL 的体系化对比调研

summary.en: A systematic comparison of MySQL and PostgreSQL based on official documentation, covering governance, licensing, storage architecture, transaction isolation, SQL compatibility, JSON, indexes, extensions, replication, backup, security, operations, and metadata-system suitability.
summary.zh: 基于 MySQL 与 PostgreSQL 官方文档，系统比较二者在项目治理、许可协议、存储架构、事务隔离、SQL 兼容、JSON、索引、扩展、复制、备份、安全、运维和元数据系统适配性上的差异。

readingDirection.en: Read this when choosing between MySQL and PostgreSQL for OLTP systems, metadata platforms, configuration centers, or relational database infrastructure.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在为 OLTP 系统、元数据平台、配置中心或关系型数据库基础设施选择 MySQL 与 PostgreSQL 时阅读。
